name: Godrej 1.5 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC (WIC)
shortDescription: 1.5T 5-Star Godrej WIC Inverter split AC — 100 – 160 sq. ft., R-32, BEE certified.
description:
The Godrej 1.5 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC (WIC) (Model 18F5TG) is a Godrej WIC-series 1.5-ton 5-star inverter split air conditioner built for Indian summers.

  • BEE 5-Star rated for maximum energy efficiency
  • Variable-speed inverter compressor for efficient, quiet cooling
  • R-32 eco-friendly refrigerant
  • Auto-restart after power interruption
  • Recommended room size: 100 – 160 sq. ft.

descriptionSections.title: Godrej 1.5 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC (WIC)
descriptionSections.subtitle: 1.5 Ton · 5-Star BEE · WIC Series · Model 18F5TG

descriptionSections.title: Inverter Technology for Indian Homes
descriptionSections.subtitle: WIC (Wall Inverter Cool) — premium wall-mount inverter line with enhanced efficiency and quiet operation.
descriptionSections.html: The 18F5TG uses a variable-speed inverter compressor that ramps up or down based on room temperature. Unlike conventional ACs that cycle on/off, it maintains comfort with fewer temperature swings and lower power draw on partial loads — especially valuable during humid monsoon evenings.

shortDescription: 2.5T 3-Star Godrej HIC Inverter split AC — 240 – 300 sq. ft., R-32, BEE certified.
description:
The Godrej 2.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC (HIC) (Model 30K3TG) is a Godrej HIC-series 2.5-ton 3-star inverter split air conditioner built for Indian summers.

  • BEE 3-Star rated for standard energy efficiency
  • Variable-speed inverter compressor for efficient, quiet cooling
  • R-32 eco-friendly refrigerant
  • Auto-restart after power interruption
  • Recommended room size: 240 – 300 sq. ft.

descriptionSections.title: Godrej 2.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC (HIC)
descriptionSections.subtitle: 2.5 Ton · 3-Star BEE · HIC Series · Model 30K3TG

descriptionSections.title: Inverter Technology for Indian Homes
descriptionSections.subtitle: HIC (Heavy-duty Inverter Cool) — Godrej's popular inverter split range built for Indian summers and voltage fluctuations.
descriptionSections.html: The 30K3TG uses a variable-speed inverter compressor that ramps up or down based on room temperature. Unlike conventional ACs that cycle on/off, it maintains comfort with fewer temperature swings and lower power draw on partial loads — especially valuable during humid monsoon evenings.
